title: Creamy Roasted Greek Chickpeas Revithia
description: A roasted, velvety weeknight Greek dish featuring chickpeas, bhuna spice, and a low-carb friendly profile, served in an earthenware bowl in the form of revithia.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the chickpeas with olive oil, bhuna spice, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the chickpeas in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 30 minutes.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic over medium heat until the onion is translucent.
Add the roasted chickpeas, lemon juice, and heavy cream to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the mixture for 10 minutes or until it has thickened slightly.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the revithia to an earthenware bowl and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the revithia hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
